ESCALATE_FULL_NAME: /resume changed field -> DIFFERENT_INPUT -> re-run IDology PASS. [UPDATED] resultcode.last.name.does.not.match routes through LN(any)+Persona (create->PENDING, resume persona_kyc_verified=PASS) BEFORE escalation; Idology re-checked on loop-back (still fails -> ESCALATE_FULL_NAME); final resume with corrected input re-runs Idology once more -> PASS. [FIXED] LexisNexis NAS RiskCode 2->7 (NAS_NON_SSN_FAIL_CODES, per real lexisnexis/constants.py): NAS=2 is an SSN-fail code, so trigger 30 ({8:FAIL_SSN,9:PASS}->ESCALATE_SSN) tied in specificity with the intended field-specific trigger and won the id tie-break, masking it. NAS=7 removes trigger 30 from contention so the intended ESCALATE_* fires uncontested. [SHEET SL#11] Reused proven case ESC-FULL_NAME-DIFF as the direct automated equivalent of this manual test case. Corrected PII (different first/last name) -> DIFFERENT_INPUT -> idology re-invoked -> eventually PASSED, proving the re-entry retry routes back through IDology.

Re-entry beyond max_step_attempts -> ERROR (boundary max+1). [UPDATED] Missing LN+Persona routing and prior persona_kyc_verified=PASS resume before the corrected-SSN resume; Idology loop-back re-check (2nd seeded response, still fails) triggers ESCALATE_SSN; the corrected-SSN resume then exceeds max_step_attempts on the Idology step (no 3rd Idology response seeded) -> flow ERROR. [SHEET SL#20] BLOCKED -- could not construct "different SSN + IDology fail WITHOUT escalation -> LexisNexis" as literally specified. Verified via RuleEngine trace (see uks-flow-graph-routing memory / trigger evaluation logs): once a Persona PASS decision exists on the flow, EVERY idology FAIL_* code pairs with a dedicated ESCALATE_* trigger keyed on {step7: FAIL_X, step9: PASS} (ids 30/36/37/38/39/40/41 cover SSN/SSN_DOB/FULL_NAME/DOB/ADDRESS/MOB) -- there is no idology failure code post-persona-pass that routes to LexisNexis without also matching an escalation trigger. "Fail without escalation -> LexisNexis" only happens on the flow's FIRST idology attempt (before any persona decision exists), which SHEET-03/TC-002 already cover. Needs product/business clarification on whether this sheet row describes a state that's reachable in the current flow graph at all, or should be re-scoped to the first-attempt case.

[SHEET SL#21] NEW case -- corrected SSN resume triggers the 2nd real IDology call, which fails with a DIFFERENT escalation-eligible code (resultcode.last.name.does.not.match / FAIL_NAME) instead of repeating FAIL_SSN. RuleEngine re-evaluates {step7: FAIL_NAME, step9: PASS} against the still-recorded Persona PASS decision and matches trigger 38 (ESCALATE_FULL_NAME) instead of trigger 37 (ESCALATE_SSN) -- demonstrating cross-escalation-type routing ("PII Escalation after SSN correction"). Flow parks PENDING again with a NEW escalation_log row for ESCALATE_FULL_NAME while the original ESCALATE_SSN row stays resolved DIFFERENT_INPUT. NOT YET RUN AGAINST LIVE AUT -- verify before trusting this case.
